stemHtml: What does the term "Expected Approach Time" mean?

options.a: The time at which ATC expects that an arriving aircraft, following a delay, will leave the holding point to complete its approach for a landing.
options.b: The time at which an arriving aircraft expects to arrive over the appropriate designated navigation aid serving the destination aerodrome.
options.c: The holding time over the radio facility from which the instrument approach procedure for a landing will be initiated.
options.d: The time at which an arriving aircraft, upon reaching the radio aid serving the destination aerodrome, will commence the instrument approach procedure for a landing.
